articles.title: Holiday declared for schools, PU colleges on July 3 amid orange alert in Dakshina Kannada - Mangalore Today
articles.search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Karnataka
articles.full_text:
Friday, July 03
Mangalore Today News Network
In an order issued on Thursday, Deputy Commissioner Darshan H. V. said the holiday applies to all anganwadi centres, primary and secondary schools, government-aided and private schools, and PU colleges in the district as a precautionary measure.
The district has been witnessing persistent rainfall, and the prevailing weather conditions are expected to continue, prompting authorities to issue the Orange Alert.
The district administration has also warned that strict legal action will be taken under the Disaster Management Act, 2005, against any institution found conducting classes in violation of the holiday order.
